must_look_like: thirty-something Japanese detective with calm restraint
longish oval face with clean jawline
medium-high stature with straight shoulders and back
short black hair neatly side-parted or combed back
deep gray or navy old suit, white shirt, low-key tie
stable standing pose, often leaning on wall or desk observing
mild but insightful eyes, controlled movements
ordinary office worker with fatigued suit
ordinary oval to square-ish face with soft jawline
medium height with slightly slumped shoulders
short black hair slightly messy from work fatigue
deep blue or charcoal business suit, white shirt, slightly loose tie
拘谨 sitting or standing pose with hands fidgeting tie or knees
reliable but anxious eyes with under-eye fatigue

MISAKI_FEMALE.age_band: 符合角色设定的明确年龄段
must_look_like: 佐藤美咲有可执行的脸型骨相，与其他角色明显不同
发型轮廓来自角色设定，保持本集连续
正常真人头身比，体态符合年龄、职业和剧情身份
固定服装来自角色设定，同一集内不换装
must_not_look_like: 真人写实比例，头部不过大，身体不变形，年龄视觉必须准确。
MISAKI_FEMALE.camera_priority: 正常真人比例，脸部清楚，头身比例准确

rules: ISHIKAWA has longer narrower oval face vs KENICHI's softer square-ish face
ISHIKAWA appears more mature and sharp in thirties vibe vs KENICHI's older fatigued forties sense
ISHIKAWA has broader straighter shoulders vs KENICHI's narrower slumped ones
ISHIKAWA's hair neatly side-parted vs KENICHI's messier office style
ISHIKAWA wears deep old suit without looseness vs KENICHI's business suit with loose tie as identifier
ISHIKAWA poses stably observant vs KENICHI's anxious fidgeting posture

pairwise_rules.contrast_focus: visual differentiation in same scene to avoid blending: emphasize ISHIKAWA's professional restraint against KENICHI's everyday fatigue
